title: First-Line Supervisors of Construction Trades and Extraction Workers
description: Directly supervise and coordinate activities of construction or extraction workers.

tasks.text: Inspect work progress, equipment, or construction sites to verify safety or to ensure that specifications are met.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Read specifications, such as blueprints, to determine construction requirements or to plan procedures.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Supervise, coordinate, or schedule the activities of construction or extractive workers.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Assign work to employees, based on material or worker requirements of specific jobs.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Coordinate work activities with other construction project activities.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Estimate material or worker requirements to complete jobs.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Analyze worker or production problems and recommend solutions, such as improving production methods or implementing motivational plans.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Order or requisition materials or supplies.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Train workers in construction methods, operation of equipment, safety procedures, or company policies.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Locate, measure, and mark site locations or placement of structures or equipment, using measuring and marking equipment.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Confer with managerial or technical personnel, other departments, or contractors to resolve problems or to coordinate activities.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Arrange for repairs of equipment or machinery.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Provide assistance to workers engaged in construction or extraction activities, using hand tools or other equipment.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Record information, such as personnel, production, or operational data on specified forms or reports.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Suggest or initiate personnel actions, such as promotions, transfers, or hires.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
